betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Diesel Generator§f

§aCompact liquid-fuel generator — burns oil byproducts for power with efficiency scaling by fuel grade!§f

The §bDiesel Generator§f is a simple, single-block generator that burns liquid fuels to produce energy. Despite its name, it accepts many fuels beyond diesel, with effectiveness scaling by fuel grade. Its small size and good efficiency with common oil processing byproducts make it an essential mid-game power source.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Machine):
§b• §e1×§f Steel Shell
§b• §e2×§f Cast Copper Plate
§b• §e4×§f Copper Coil

§6Operation§f:
§b• Internal Tank§f: §e4,000mB§f capacity.
§b• Consumption Rate§f: §e20 mB/s§f (drains regardless of power buffer).
§b• Energy Buffer§f: §e50 kHE§f (small — fuel does NOT halt when full, so avoid waste).
§b• Fuel Input§f: Via fluid ducts or barrels in the internal item slot. Change accepted fuel with a Fluid Identifier.

§6Fuel Grade Efficiency§f:
§b• Low Grade§f: §e0%§f (will not accept).
§b• Medium Grade§f: §e50%§f.
§b• High Grade§f: §e75%§f.
§b• Aviation Grade§f: §e10%§f.
§b• Gaseous§f: §e0%§f (will not accept).

§eTip§f: Do NOT feed the Diesel Generator your best fuels! Diesel burns at §e75%§f efficiency, making it ideal. Save higher-value products like Gasoline, Kerosene, or Reformate for crafting. The §e50 kHE§f buffer fills quickly — use a Redstone Comparator or Fluid Detector to shut off the generator when your battery bank is full to prevent fuel waste!
